key.name: daily-limit-mb
key.description: When cumulative Wi-Fi usage reaches this many megabytes, Cap terminates the wireless interface.

key.name: used-bytes
key.description: Accumulated Wi-Fi byte count for the current calendar day. Reset to 0 automatically at midnight.

key.name: current-date
key.description: The date (YYYY-MM-DD) for which used-bytes has been accumulated. Used to detect day rollover.
